top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Climb as Tech Rallies, Nvidia Slips : Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian shares advanced for the first time in five days as Samsung Electronics Co. averted a strike and helped South Korean equities jump. Nvidia Corp. shares slipped in a lukewarm response to its sales forecast.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
